problem id: aa3ae31f
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  11111100 -> 11110111
  10001101 -> 00010010
  11000110 -> 10000000
  01101010 -> 11010010
  00010000 -> 00100001
  01111110 -> 11111011
  00000101 -> 00001010
  11100000 -> 11001110

query: 01001100
predicted answer: 10011100
